title: [InstCombine] Set `samesign` when converting signed predicates into unsigned

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary does not mention vector types; this test uses <2 x i64> vector comparison which should also benefit from the same-sign optimization but is not explicitly covered in the summary text

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define <2 x i1> @vector_zext_slt(<2 x i32> %a, <2 x i32> %b) {
#0:
  %x = zext <2 x i32> %a to <2 x i64>
  %y = zext <2 x i32> %b to <2 x i64>
  %cmp = icmp slt <2 x i64> %x, %y
  ret <2 x i1> %cmp
}
=>
define <2 x i1> @vector_zext_slt(<2 x i32> %a, <2 x i32> %b) {
#0:
  %cmp = icmp ult <2 x i32> %a, %b
  ret <2 x i1> %cmp
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary does not specify integer width limitations; this test uses i128 which is outside the typical i32/i64 examples shown in the summary but should still be optimizable

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @i128_zext_slt(i64 %a, i64 %b) {
#0:
  %x = zext i64 %a to i128
  %y = zext i64 %b to i128
  %cmp = icmp slt i128 %x, %y
  ret i1 %cmp
}
=>
define i1 @i128_zext_slt(i64 %a, i64 %b) {
#0:
  %cmp = icmp ult i64 %a, %b
  ret i1 %cmp
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary focuses on signed-to-unsigned conversion; this test covers the NEW behavior where unsigned comparisons without same-sign flag get the flag added, which is the key generalization but not demonstrated in existing test examples

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @unsigned_needs_same_sign(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
#0:
  %x = zext i32 %a to i64
  %y = zext i32 %b to i64
  %cmp = icmp ult i64 %x, %y
  ret i1 %cmp
}
=>
define i1 @unsigned_needs_same_sign(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
#0:
  %cmp = icmp ult i32 %a, %b
  ret i1 %cmp
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors
